title: Delta Air Lines flies on improved fourth-quarter outlook and upbeat guidance for 2023
text: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) has told investors that it expects revenue in 2023 to expand by 15 to 20% from 2022 levels as demand for air travel remains strong and its own momentum continues to build, sending its shares higher.  In an outlook statement ahead of a presentation to the investment community, the airline also forecast a near doubling of 2023 earnings per share (EPS) to $5 to $6, supported by margin expansion and keeping it on track for its 2024 earnings target of over $7 per share.

title: Exclusive: Delta offers 34% pay raise to pilots in new contract
